view.definition:
WITH assignment_data AS (SELECT a.level,
                                a.activity_id,
                                ac.uid                                                   AS activity_uid,
                                ac.name                                                  AS activity_name,
                                u.first_name                                             AS user_info,
                                t.code                                                   AS assigned_team_no,
                                a.start_day,
                                ou.code                                                  AS org_unit_code,
                                ou.gov                                                   AS gov_name,
                                ou.district                                              AS district_name,
                                ou.name                                                  AS org_unit_name,
                                a.uid                                                    AS assignment_uid,
                                NULLIF(split_part(a.path::text, ','::text, 2), ''::text) AS level1_assignment_uid,
                                NULLIF(split_part(a.path::text, ','::text, 3), ''::text) AS level2_assignment_uid,
                                NULLIF(split_part(a.path::text, ','::text, 4), ''::text) AS level3_assignment_uid,
                                a.id                                                     AS assignment_id,
                                a.parent_id,
                                a.path,
                                u.uid                                                    AS user_uid,
                                t.uid                                                    AS team_uid,
                                ou.uid                                                   AS org_unit_uid,
                                ou.id                                                    AS org_unit_id,
                                u.login                                                  AS username,
                                (a.allocated_resources ->> 'Longitude'::text)::numeric   AS longitude,
                                (a.allocated_resources ->> 'Latitude'::text)::numeric    AS latitude
                         FROM assignment a
                                  JOIN _mv_org_unit_hierarchy ou ON a.org_unit_id = ou.id
                                  JOIN activity ac ON ac.id = a.activity_id
                                  LEFT JOIN team t ON a.team_id = t.id
                                  LEFT JOIN team_user tu ON t.id = tu.team_id
                                  LEFT JOIN app_user u ON tu.user_id = u.id
                         WHERE ac.disabled = false)
SELECT wha.org_unit_name AS level1_org_unit_name,
       wha.user_info     AS level1_user_info,
       asd.activity_uid,
       asd.activity_id,
       asd.activity_name,
       asd.level,
       asd.user_info,
       asd.assigned_team_no,
       asd.start_day,
       asd.org_unit_code,
       asd.gov_name,
       asd.district_name,
       asd.org_unit_name,
       asd.assignment_uid,
       asd.level1_assignment_uid,
       asd.level2_assignment_uid,
       asd.level3_assignment_uid,
       asd.assignment_id,
       asd.parent_id,
       asd.path,
       asd.user_uid,
       asd.team_uid,
       asd.org_unit_uid,
       asd.org_unit_id,
       asd.username,
       asd.longitude,
       asd.latitude,
       wha.user_uid      AS level1_user_uid,
       wha.team_uid      AS level1_team_uid,
       wha.username      AS level1_username
FROM assignment_data asd
         LEFT JOIN assignment_data wha ON asd.level1_assignment_uid = wha.assignment_uid::text
ORDER BY asd.level, asd.assigned_team_no, asd.start_day;

alter materialized view _mv_assignments_info owner to "dataRunApi"
view.name: _mv_assignments_info

view.definition:
SELECT ac.id      AS activity_id,
       ac.uid     AS activity_uid,
       ac.name    AS activity_name,
       t.id       AS team_id,
       t.uid      AS team_uid,
       t.code     AS team_code,
       t.name     AS team_name,
       ou.id      AS ou_id,
       ou.uid     AS ou_uid,
       ou.code    AS ou_code,
       ou.name    AS ou_name,
       ou.gov,
       ou.district,
       ou.level,
       ou.path,
       u.first_name,
       u.last_name,
       u.login,
       u.id       AS user_id,
       u.uid      AS user_uid,
       assi.uid   AS assignment,
       assi.forms AS form
FROM team t
         LEFT JOIN activity ac ON t.activity_id = ac.id
         LEFT JOIN team_user tu ON t.id = tu.team_id
         LEFT JOIN app_user u ON tu.user_id = u.id
         LEFT JOIN assignment assi ON assi.team_id = t.id
         LEFT JOIN _mv_org_unit_hierarchy ou ON assi.org_unit_id = ou.id
WHERE t.activity_id = ANY (ARRAY [670262::bigint, 663712::bigint, 675862::bigint, 688862::bigint])
ORDER BY (t.code::integer), ou.code;

alter materialized view _mv_assignments_info_larval owner to "dataRunApi"
view.name: _mv_assignments_info_larval

view.definition:
SELECT ac.id      AS activity_id,
       ac.uid     AS activity_uid,
       ac.name    AS activity_name,
       t.id       AS team_id,
       t.uid      AS team_uid,
       t.code     AS team_code,
       t.name     AS team_name,
       ou.id      AS ou_id,
       ou.uid     AS ou_uid,
       ou.code    AS ou_code,
       ou.name    AS ou_name,
       ou.gov,
       ou.district,
       ou.level,
       ou.path,
       u.first_name,
       u.last_name,
       u.login,
       u.id       AS user_id,
       u.uid      AS user_uid,
       assi.uid   AS assignment,
       assi.forms AS form
FROM team t
         LEFT JOIN activity ac ON t.activity_id = ac.id
         LEFT JOIN team_user tu ON t.id = tu.team_id
         LEFT JOIN app_user u ON tu.user_id = u.id
         LEFT JOIN assignment assi ON assi.team_id = t.id
         LEFT JOIN _mv_org_unit_hierarchy ou ON assi.org_unit_id = ou.id
WHERE t.activity_id = ANY (ARRAY [576662::bigint])
ORDER BY (t.code::integer), ou.code;

alter materialized view _mv_assignments_info_phase3 owner to "dataRunApi"
view.name: _mv_assignments_info_phase3

view.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT ON (t.id) t.id,
                          t.uid,
                          t.code,
                          a.activity_name,
                          t.name,
                          a.first_name AS user_info,
                          a.login      AS username,
                          mt.team_id   AS supervisor_team,
                          st.code      AS supervisor_code
FROM team t
         JOIN _mv_assignments_info_larval a ON t.id = a.team_id
         JOIN team_managed_teams mt ON mt.managed_team_id = t.id
         JOIN team st ON st.id = mt.team_id
WHERE (t.activity_id = ANY (ARRAY [670262::bigint, 688862::bigint]))
  AND st.code::integer < 300
  AND st.name::text !~~ '%transport'::text
ORDER BY t.id;

alter materialized view _mv_lsm_field_teams owner to "dataRunApi"
view.name: _mv_lsm_field_teams

view.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT ON (t.id) t.id,
                          t.uid,
                          a.ou_name,
                          a.gov,
                          a.district,
                          a.activity_name,
                          t.code,
                          t.name,
                          a.first_name AS user_info
FROM team t
         JOIN team_managed_teams tm ON t.id = tm.team_id
         JOIN _mv_assignments_info_larval a ON t.id = a.team_id
WHERE (t.activity_id = ANY (ARRAY [670262::bigint, 688862::bigint]))
  AND t.name::text !~~ '%transport'::text
  AND t.code::integer < 300;

alter materialized view _mv_lsm_supervisor_teams owner to "dataRunApi"
view.name: _mv_lsm_supervisor_teams

view.definition:
WITH hierarchy_cte AS (SELECT org_unit.id,
                              org_unit.uid,
                              org_unit.code,
                              org_unit.name,
                              org_unit.path,
                              org_unit.parent_id,
                              org_unit.level,
                              NULLIF(split_part(org_unit.path::text, ','::text, 2), ''::text) AS country_uid,
                              NULLIF(split_part(org_unit.path::text, ','::text, 3), ''::text) AS governorate_uid,
                              NULLIF(split_part(org_unit.path::text, ','::text, 4), ''::text) AS district_uid,
                              NULLIF(split_part(org_unit.path::text, ','::text, 5), ''::text) AS subdistrict_uid,
                              NULLIF(split_part(org_unit.path::text, ','::text, 6), ''::text) AS village_uid
                       FROM org_unit),
     org_unit_with_parent AS (SELECT h.id,
                                     h.uid,
                                     h.code,
                                     h.name,
                                     h.path,
                                     h.parent_id,
                                     h.level,
                                     h.country_uid,
                                     h.governorate_uid,
                                     h.district_uid,
                                     h.subdistrict_uid,
                                     h.village_uid
                              FROM hierarchy_cte h
                                       JOIN assignment a ON h.id = a.org_unit_id
                              UNION ALL
                              SELECT h.id,
                                     h.uid,
                                     h.code,
                                     h.name,
                                     h.path,
                                     h.parent_id,
                                     h.level,
                                     h.country_uid,
                                     h.governorate_uid,
                                     h.district_uid,
                                     h.subdistrict_uid,
                                     h.village_uid
                              FROM hierarchy_cte h
                              WHERE h.level = ANY (ARRAY [1, 2, 3, 4])),
     linked_ou AS (SELECT DISTINCT ou.id,
                                   ou.uid,
                                   ou.code,
                                   ou.name,
                                   ou.path,
                                   ou.parent_id,
                                   ou.level,
                                   ou.country_uid,
                                   ou.governorate_uid,
                                   ou.district_uid,
                                   ou.subdistrict_uid,
                                   ou.village_uid
                   FROM org_unit_with_parent ou)
SELECT lou.id,
       lou.uid,
       lou.code,
       lou.name,
       lou.path,
       lou.parent_id,
       lou.level,
       lou.village_uid,
       gov.name      AS gov,
       district.name AS district
FROM linked_ou lou
         JOIN org_unit gov ON gov.uid::text = lou.governorate_uid
         JOIN org_unit district ON district.uid::text = lou.district_uid;

alter materialized view _mv_org_unit_hierarchy owner to "dataRunApi"
view.name: _mv_org_unit_hierarchy

view.definition:
WITH hierarchy_cte AS (SELECT org_unit.id,
                              org_unit.uid,
                              org_unit.code,
                              org_unit.name,
                              org_unit.path,
                              org_unit.parent_id,
                              org_unit.level,
                              NULLIF(split_part(org_unit.path::text, ','::text, 2), ''::text) AS country_uid,
                              NULLIF(split_part(org_unit.path::text, ','::text, 3), ''::text) AS governorate_uid,
                              NULLIF(split_part(org_unit.path::text, ','::text, 4), ''::text) AS district_uid,
                              NULLIF(split_part(org_unit.path::text, ','::text, 5), ''::text) AS subdistrict_uid,
                              NULLIF(split_part(org_unit.path::text, ','::text, 6), ''::text) AS village_uid
                       FROM org_unit),
     org_unit_with_parent AS (SELECT h.id,
                                     h.uid,
                                     h.code,
                                     h.name,
                                     h.path,
                                     h.parent_id,
                                     h.level,
                                     h.country_uid,
                                     h.governorate_uid,
                                     h.district_uid,
                                     h.subdistrict_uid,
                                     h.village_uid
                              FROM hierarchy_cte h
                                       JOIN assignment a ON h.id = a.org_unit_id
                              UNION ALL
                              SELECT h.id,
                                     h.uid,
                                     h.code,
                                     h.name,
                                     h.path,
                                     h.parent_id,
                                     h.level,
                                     h.country_uid,
                                     h.governorate_uid,
                                     h.district_uid,
                                     h.subdistrict_uid,
                                     h.village_uid
                              FROM hierarchy_cte h
                              WHERE h.level = ANY (ARRAY [1, 2, 3, 4]))
SELECT DISTINCT id,
                uid,
                code,
                name,
                path,
                parent_id,
                level,
                country_uid,
                governorate_uid,
                district_uid,
                subdistrict_uid,
                village_uid
FROM org_unit_with_parent ou;

alter materialized view _mv_org_unit_hierarchy_copy1 owner to "dataRunApi"
view.name: _mv_org_unit_hierarchy_copy1

view.definition:
SELECT activity.code AS activity_code,
       team.id,
       team.uid,
       team.code,
       team.name,
       team.description,
       team.disabled,
       team.delete_client_data,
       team.created_by,
       team.created_date,
       team.last_modified_by,
       team.last_modified_date,
       team.activity_id,
       team.enabled_from,
       team.enabled_to,
       team.form_permissions
FROM team
         JOIN activity ON team.activity_id = activity.id
WHERE activity.code::text = ANY
      (ARRAY ['ITNs_2024_PHASE_1'::character varying, 'ITNs_2024_PHASE_2'::character varying, 'ITNs_2024_PHASE_3'::character varying]::text[]);

alter materialized view _mv_teams owner to "dataRunApi"
view.name: _mv_teams

view.definition:
SELECT m.deleted_system,
       m.teamcode,
       m.workday,
       m.orgunit,
       m.orgunitcode,
       m.orgunitname,
       m.movementtype,
       m.larvicidetype,
       m.opening,
       m._team_leader,
       t.code              AS team_leader_code,
       app_user.first_name AS team_leader_user,
       m.delivered_to_team,
       m.closing,
       m.uom,
       m.id,
       m._id,
       m.activity,
       m.assignment,
       m.team_supervisor,
       m.uid
FROM _lsm_movement m
         LEFT JOIN team t ON m._team_leader::text = t.uid::text
         LEFT JOIN team_user ON t.id = team_user.team_id
         LEFT JOIN app_user ON team_user.user_id = app_user.id
WHERE m.deleted_system <> true;

alter table _v_movement_submission
    owner to "dataRunApi"
view.name: _v_movement_submission

view.definition:
SELECT m.deleted_system,
       m.teamcode,
       m.workday,
       m.orgunit,
       m.orgunitcode,
       m.orgunitname,
       m.movementtype,
       m.larvicidetype,
       m.opening,
       m._team_leader,
       t.code              AS team_leader_code,
       app_user.first_name AS team_leader_user,
       m.delivered_to_team,
       m.closing,
       m.uom,
       m.id,
       m._id,
       m.activity,
       m.assignment,
       m.team_supervisor,
       m.uid
FROM _lsm_movement m
         LEFT JOIN team t ON m._team_leader::text = t.uid::text
         LEFT JOIN team_user ON t.id = team_user.team_id
         LEFT JOIN app_user ON team_user.user_id = app_user.id
WHERE m.deleted_system <> true
  AND m.createddate > '2025-05-23 00:00:00'::timestamp without time zone;

alter table _v_movement_submission_2
    owner to "dataRunApi"
view.name: _v_movement_submission_2

view.definition:
SELECT rep.deleted_system,
       rep.teamcode,
       rep.workday,
       rep.orgunitcode,
       rep.orgunitname,
       rep._team_leader,
       t.code       AS team_leader_code,
       u.first_name AS team_leader_first_name,
       rep.habitats_requiring_heavy_equipment,
       rep.permanently_managed_habitats,
       rep.official_initiative_parties,
       rep.community_initiative_teams_members,
       rep.initiatively_managed_habitats,
       rep.total_tires_collected,
       rep.temporarily_managed_habitats,
       rep.community_initiative_teams,
       rep.cumulative_covered_villages,
       rep.cumulative_remaining_villages,
       rep.local_authorities_managed_habitats,
       rep.cumulative_performance_ratio,
       rep.orgunit,
       rep.activity,
       rep.assignment,
       rep.team_supervisor,
       rep.id,
       rep._id
FROM _lsm_supervisor rep
         LEFT JOIN team t ON rep._team_leader::text = t.uid::text
         LEFT JOIN team_user tu ON t.id = tu.team_id
         LEFT JOIN app_user u ON tu.user_id = u.id
WHERE rep.deleted_system <> true;

alter table _v_supervisor_submission
    owner to "dataRunApi"
view.name: _v_supervisor_submission

view.definition:
SELECT rep.deleted_system,
       rep.teamcode,
       rep.workday,
       rep.orgunitcode,
       rep.orgunitname,
       rep._team_leader,
       t.code       AS team_leader_code,
       u.first_name AS team_leader_first_name,
       rep.habitats_requiring_heavy_equipment,
       rep.permanently_managed_habitats,
       rep.official_initiative_parties,
       rep.community_initiative_teams_members,
       rep.initiatively_managed_habitats,
       rep.total_tires_collected,
       rep.temporarily_managed_habitats,
       rep.community_initiative_teams,
       rep.cumulative_covered_villages,
       rep.cumulative_remaining_villages,
       rep.local_authorities_managed_habitats,
       rep.cumulative_performance_ratio,
       rep.orgunit,
       rep.activity,
       rep.assignment,
       rep.team_supervisor,
       rep.id,
       rep._id
FROM _lsm_supervisor rep
         LEFT JOIN team t ON rep._team_leader::text = t.uid::text
         LEFT JOIN team_user tu ON t.id = tu.team_id
         LEFT JOIN app_user u ON tu.user_id = u.id
WHERE rep.deleted_system <> true
  AND rep.createddate > '2025-05-23 00:00:00'::timestamp without time zone;

alter table _v_supervisor_submission_2
    owner to "dataRunApi"
view.name: _v_supervisor_submission_2

view.definition:
SELECT m.form,
       m.id,
       hh._id,
       m.team,
       m.orgunit,
       m.assignment,
       m.activity,
       m.uid,
       m.teamcode,
       m.visitdate,
       m.workday,
       m.presence_of_breeding_sites,
       m.orgunitcode,
       m.orgunitname,
       m.householdname,
       m.householdserial,
       hh.other_parties_participated,
       hh.larval_sample_collected,
       hh.breeding_habitat_description,
       hh.indoor_lsm_yesno,
       hh.larval_sample_id,
       hh.breeding_habitats_count,
       hh.other_breeding_habitat,
       hh.larval_stage_presence,
       hh.breeding_habitat_type,
       CASE
           WHEN hh.lsm_type::text ~ 'دائم'::text THEN 1
           ELSE 0
           END AS treatment_permanent,
       CASE
           WHEN hh.lsm_type::text ~ 'مؤقت'::text THEN 1
           ELSE 0
           END AS treatment_temporary,
       CASE
           WHEN hh.lsm_type::text ~ 'مكافحة'::text THEN 1
           ELSE 0
           END AS treatment_larviciding,
       hh.lsm_type,
       hh.breeding_habitat_width_meter,
       hh.breeding_habitat_length_meter,
       hh.breeding_habitat_depth_meter,
       hh.temphos_ml,
       hh.growth_regulator_grams
FROM _lsm_team_leader_main m
         JOIN _lsm_team_leader hh ON m.id::text = hh.id::text
WHERE m.deleted_system <> true;

alter table _v_tl_submissions_breading_sites
    owner to "dataRunApi"
view.name: _v_tl_submissions_breading_sites

view.definition:
SELECT m.form,
       m.id,
       hh._id,
       m.team,
       m.orgunit,
       m.assignment,
       m.activity,
       m.uid,
       m.teamcode,
       m.visitdate,
       m.workday,
       m.presence_of_breeding_sites,
       m.orgunitcode,
       m.orgunitname,
       m.householdname,
       m.householdserial,
       hh.other_parties_participated,
       hh.larval_sample_collected,
       hh.breeding_habitat_description,
       hh.indoor_lsm_yesno,
       hh.larval_sample_id,
       hh.breeding_habitats_count,
       hh.other_breeding_habitat,
       hh.larval_stage_presence,
       hh.breeding_habitat_type,
       CASE
           WHEN hh.lsm_type::text ~ 'دائم'::text THEN 1
           ELSE 0
           END AS treatment_permanent,
       CASE
           WHEN hh.lsm_type::text ~ 'مؤقت'::text THEN 1
           ELSE 0
           END AS treatment_temporary,
       CASE
           WHEN hh.lsm_type::text ~ 'مكافحة'::text THEN 1
           ELSE 0
           END AS treatment_larviciding,
       hh.lsm_type,
       hh.breeding_habitat_width_meter,
       hh.breeding_habitat_length_meter,
       hh.breeding_habitat_depth_meter,
       hh.temphos_ml,
       hh.growth_regulator_grams
FROM _lsm_team_leader_main m
         JOIN _lsm_team_leader hh ON m.id::text = hh.id::text
WHERE m.deleted_system <> true
  AND m.createddate > '2025-05-23 00:00:00'::timestamp without time zone;

alter table _v_tl_submissions_breading_sites_2
    owner to "dataRunApi"
view.name: _v_tl_submissions_breading_sites_2

view.definition:
SELECT id AS parent_report_id,
       uid,
       serialnumber,
       deleted_system,
       teamcode,
       orgunitcode,
       orgunitname,
       householdname,
       householdserial,
       visitdate,
       workday,
       presence_of_breeding_sites,
       form,
       version,
       activity,
       assignment,
       team,
       status,
       orgunit,
       startentrytime,
       finishedentrytime,
       createddate
FROM _lsm_team_leader_main tlm
WHERE deleted_system <> true
  AND serialnumber > 61335;

alter table _v_tl_submissions_main
    owner to "dataRunApi"
view.name: _v_tl_submissions_main

view.definition:
SELECT id,
       uid,
       serialnumber,
       deleted_system,
       teamcode,
       orgunitcode,
       orgunitname,
       householdname,
       householdserial,
       visitdate,
       workday,
       presence_of_breeding_sites,
       form,
       version,
       activity,
       assignment,
       team,
       status,
       orgunit,
       startentrytime,
       finishedentrytime,
       createddate
FROM _lsm_team_leader_main
WHERE deleted_system <> true
  AND createddate > '2025-05-23 00:00:00'::timestamp without time zone;

alter table _v_tl_submissions_main_2
    owner to "dataRunApi"
view.name: _v_tl_submissions_main_2

view.definition:
WITH base AS (SELECT tl.id,
                     tl._id,
                     tl.temphos_ml,
                     tl.growth_regulator_grams,
                     tl.breeding_habitat_length_meter,
                     llw.min_value AS length_min,
                     llw.max_value AS length_max,
                     llw.mid_value AS length_mid,
                     tl.breeding_habitat_width_meter,
                     lww.min_value AS width_min,
                     lww.max_value AS width_max,
                     lww.mid_value AS width_mid,
                     tl.breeding_habitat_depth_meter,
                     d.min_value   AS depth_min,
                     d.max_value   AS depth_max,
                     d.mid_value   AS depth_mid
              FROM _lsm_team_leader tl
                       JOIN _lsm_team_leader_main tm ON tm.id::text = tl.id::text
                       JOIN _dim_sizes lww ON tl.breeding_habitat_width_meter::text = lww.key::text
                       JOIN _dim_sizes llw ON tl.breeding_habitat_length_meter::text = llw.key::text
                       JOIN _dim_sizes d ON tl.breeding_habitat_depth_meter::text = d.key::text
              WHERE (tl.breeding_habitat_type::text <> ALL
                     (ARRAY ['Household_water_storage_containers'::character varying, 'tires'::character varying]::text[]))
                AND tm.deleted_system <> true),
     computations AS (SELECT base.id,
                             base._id,
                             base.temphos_ml,
                             base.growth_regulator_grams,
                             base.breeding_habitat_length_meter,
                             base.length_min,
                             base.length_max,
                             base.length_mid,
                             base.breeding_habitat_width_meter,
                             base.width_min,
                             base.width_max,
                             base.width_mid,
                             base.breeding_habitat_depth_meter,
                             base.depth_min,
                             base.depth_max,
                             base.depth_mid,
                             base.width_min * base.length_min                  AS area_min,
                             base.width_max * base.length_max                  AS area_max,
                             base.width_mid * base.length_mid                  AS area_mid,
                             base.width_min * base.length_min * base.depth_min AS volume_min,
                             base.width_max * base.length_max * base.depth_max AS volume_max,
                             base.width_mid * base.length_mid * base.depth_mid AS volume_mid
                      FROM base),
     ratios AS (SELECT computations.id,
                       computations._id,
                       computations.breeding_habitat_length_meter,
                       computations.length_min,
                       computations.length_max,
                       computations.length_mid,
                       computations.breeding_habitat_width_meter,
                       computations.width_min,
                       computations.width_max,
                       computations.width_mid,
                       computations.breeding_habitat_depth_meter,
                       computations.depth_min,
                       computations.depth_max,
                       computations.depth_mid,
                       computations.area_min,
                       computations.area_max,
                       computations.area_mid,
                       computations.volume_min,
                       computations.volume_max,
                       computations.volume_mid,
                       computations.area_min * 10.0::double precision / 1000::double precision                 AS guideline_temephos_min_ml,
                       computations.area_max * 10.0::double precision / 1000::double precision                 AS guideline_temephos_max_ml,
                       computations.area_mid * 10.0::double precision / 1000::double precision                 AS guideline_temephos_mid_ml,
                       computations.volume_min * 2.0::double precision                                         AS guideline_gr_min_grams,
                       computations.volume_max * 2.0::double precision                                         AS guideline_gr_max_grams,
                       computations.volume_mid * 2.0::double precision                                         AS guideline_gr_mid_grams,
                       computations.temphos_ml                                                                 AS actual_temephos_ml,
                       computations.growth_regulator_grams                                                     AS actual_gr_grams,
                       computations.temphos_ml /
                       (computations.area_min * 10.0::double precision / 1000::double precision)               AS temephos_min_ratio,
                       computations.temphos_ml /
                       (computations.area_max * 10.0::double precision / 1000::double precision)               AS temephos_max_ratio,
                       computations.temphos_ml /
                       (computations.area_mid * 10.0::double precision / 1000::double precision)               AS temephos_mid_ratio,
                       computations.growth_regulator_grams /
                       (computations.volume_min * 2.0::double precision)                                       AS gr_min_ratio,
                       computations.growth_regulator_grams /
                       (computations.volume_max * 2.0::double precision)                                       AS gr_max_ratio,
                       computations.growth_regulator_grams /
                       (computations.volume_mid * 2.0::double precision)                                       AS gr_mid_ratio
                FROM computations)
SELECT id,
       _id,
       breeding_habitat_length_meter,
       length_min,
       length_max,
       length_mid,
       breeding_habitat_width_meter,
       width_min,
       width_max,
       width_mid,
       breeding_habitat_depth_meter,
       depth_min,
       depth_max,
       depth_mid,
       area_min,
       area_max,
       area_mid,
       volume_min,
       volume_max,
       volume_mid,
       guideline_temephos_min_ml,
       guideline_temephos_max_ml,
       guideline_temephos_mid_ml,
       guideline_gr_min_grams,
       guideline_gr_max_grams,
       guideline_gr_mid_grams,
       actual_temephos_ml,
       actual_gr_grams,
       temephos_min_ratio,
       temephos_max_ratio,
       temephos_mid_ratio,
       gr_min_ratio,
       gr_max_ratio,
       gr_mid_ratio,
       CASE
           WHEN actual_temephos_ml >= guideline_temephos_min_ml AND actual_temephos_ml <= guideline_temephos_max_ml
               THEN 0
           WHEN actual_temephos_ml = 0::double precision THEN 0
           WHEN actual_temephos_ml < guideline_temephos_min_ml THEN '-1'::integer
           ELSE 1
           END AS temephos_dose_category,
       CASE
           WHEN actual_gr_grams >= guideline_gr_min_grams AND actual_gr_grams <= guideline_gr_max_grams THEN 0
           WHEN actual_gr_grams = 0::double precision THEN 0
           WHEN actual_gr_grams < guideline_gr_min_grams THEN '-1'::integer
           ELSE 1
           END AS gr_dose_category
FROM ratios;

alter table _v_tl_submissions_sizes_dim
    owner to "dataRunApi"
view.name: _v_tl_submissions_sizes_dim

view.definition:
WITH base AS (SELECT tl.id,
                     tl._id,
                     tl.temphos_ml,
                     tl.growth_regulator_grams,
                     tl.breeding_habitat_length_meter,
                     llw.min_value AS length_min,
                     llw.max_value AS length_max,
                     llw.mid_value AS length_mid,
                     tl.breeding_habitat_width_meter,
                     lww.min_value AS width_min,
                     lww.max_value AS width_max,
                     lww.mid_value AS width_mid,
                     tl.breeding_habitat_depth_meter,
                     d.min_value   AS depth_min,
                     d.max_value   AS depth_max,
                     d.mid_value   AS depth_mid
              FROM _lsm_team_leader tl
                       JOIN _lsm_team_leader_main tm ON tm.id::text = tl.id::text
                       JOIN _dim_sizes lww ON tl.breeding_habitat_width_meter::text = lww.key::text
                       JOIN _dim_sizes llw ON tl.breeding_habitat_length_meter::text = llw.key::text
                       JOIN _dim_sizes d ON tl.breeding_habitat_depth_meter::text = d.key::text
              WHERE (tl.breeding_habitat_type::text <> ALL
                     (ARRAY ['Household_water_storage_containers'::character varying::text, 'tires'::character varying::text]))
                AND tm.deleted_system <> true
                AND tm.createddate > '2025-05-23 00:00:00'::timestamp without time zone),
     computations AS (SELECT base.id,
                             base._id,
                             base.temphos_ml,
                             base.growth_regulator_grams,
                             base.breeding_habitat_length_meter,
                             base.length_min,
                             base.length_max,
                             base.length_mid,
                             base.breeding_habitat_width_meter,
                             base.width_min,
                             base.width_max,
                             base.width_mid,
                             base.breeding_habitat_depth_meter,
                             base.depth_min,
                             base.depth_max,
                             base.depth_mid,
                             base.width_min * base.length_min                  AS area_min,
                             base.width_max * base.length_max                  AS area_max,
                             base.width_mid * base.length_mid                  AS area_mid,
                             base.width_min * base.length_min * base.depth_min AS volume_min,
                             base.width_max * base.length_max * base.depth_max AS volume_max,
                             base.width_mid * base.length_mid * base.depth_mid AS volume_mid
                      FROM base),
     ratios AS (SELECT computations.id,
                       computations._id,
                       computations.breeding_habitat_length_meter,
                       computations.length_min,
                       computations.length_max,
                       computations.length_mid,
                       computations.breeding_habitat_width_meter,
                       computations.width_min,
                       computations.width_max,
                       computations.width_mid,
                       computations.breeding_habitat_depth_meter,
                       computations.depth_min,
                       computations.depth_max,
                       computations.depth_mid,
                       computations.area_min,
                       computations.area_max,
                       computations.area_mid,
                       computations.volume_min,
                       computations.volume_max,
                       computations.volume_mid,
                       computations.area_min * 10.0::double precision / 1000::double precision                 AS guideline_temephos_min_ml,
                       computations.area_max * 10.0::double precision / 1000::double precision                 AS guideline_temephos_max_ml,
                       computations.area_mid * 10.0::double precision / 1000::double precision                 AS guideline_temephos_mid_ml,
                       computations.volume_min * 2.0::double precision                                         AS guideline_gr_min_grams,
                       computations.volume_max * 2.0::double precision                                         AS guideline_gr_max_grams,
                       computations.volume_mid * 2.0::double precision                                         AS guideline_gr_mid_grams,
                       computations.temphos_ml                                                                 AS actual_temephos_ml,
                       computations.growth_regulator_grams                                                     AS actual_gr_grams,
                       computations.temphos_ml /
                       (computations.area_min * 10.0::double precision / 1000::double precision)               AS temephos_min_ratio,
                       computations.temphos_ml /
                       (computations.area_max * 10.0::double precision / 1000::double precision)               AS temephos_max_ratio,
                       computations.temphos_ml /
                       (computations.area_mid * 10.0::double precision / 1000::double precision)               AS temephos_mid_ratio,
                       computations.growth_regulator_grams /
                       (computations.volume_min * 2.0::double precision)                                       AS gr_min_ratio,
                       computations.growth_regulator_grams /
                       (computations.volume_max * 2.0::double precision)                                       AS gr_max_ratio,
                       computations.growth_regulator_grams /
                       (computations.volume_mid * 2.0::double precision)                                       AS gr_mid_ratio
                FROM computations)
SELECT id,
       _id,
       breeding_habitat_length_meter,
       length_min,
       length_max,
       length_mid,
       breeding_habitat_width_meter,
       width_min,
       width_max,
       width_mid,
       breeding_habitat_depth_meter,
       depth_min,
       depth_max,
       depth_mid,
       area_min,
       area_max,
       area_mid,
       volume_min,
       volume_max,
       volume_mid,
       guideline_temephos_min_ml,
       guideline_temephos_max_ml,
       guideline_temephos_mid_ml,
       guideline_gr_min_grams,
       guideline_gr_max_grams,
       guideline_gr_mid_grams,
       actual_temephos_ml,
       actual_gr_grams,
       temephos_min_ratio,
       temephos_max_ratio,
       temephos_mid_ratio,
       gr_min_ratio,
       gr_max_ratio,
       gr_mid_ratio,
       CASE
           WHEN actual_temephos_ml >= guideline_temephos_min_ml AND actual_temephos_ml <= guideline_temephos_max_ml
               THEN 0
           WHEN actual_temephos_ml = 0::double precision THEN 0
           WHEN actual_temephos_ml < guideline_temephos_min_ml THEN '-1'::integer
           ELSE 1
           END AS temephos_dose_category,
       CASE
           WHEN actual_gr_grams >= guideline_gr_min_grams AND actual_gr_grams <= guideline_gr_max_grams THEN 0
           WHEN actual_gr_grams = 0::double precision THEN 0
           WHEN actual_gr_grams < guideline_gr_min_grams THEN '-1'::integer
           ELSE 1
           END AS gr_dose_category
FROM ratios;

alter table _v_tl_submissions_sizes_dim_2
    owner to "dataRunApi"
view.name: _v_tl_submissions_sizes_dim_2
